expectations.text: The plan uses dbt snapshot columns dbt_valid_from and dbt_valid_to for SCD2 history.
expectations.evidence: The plan mentions SCD2 but does not name the dbt_valid_from or dbt_valid_to columns.

expectations.text: The plan says fact tables should not be snapshotted for slowly changing dimensions.

suggestions.reason: The skill should explicitly cover dbt SCD2 column conventions.

eval_feedback.overall: The failure indicates a genuine skill gap.
